plugins.name: e2e-test-reviewer
plugins.description: Systematic 14-point checklist for reviewing E2E test quality across Playwright, Cypress, and Puppeteer. Tier 1 catches high-impact bugs: error swallowing (spec + POM), boolean traps, raw DOM queries, conditional bypass. Tier 2 covers quality improvements: duplicates (cross-file), hard-coded timeouts, flaky selectors, YAGNI in Page Objects.
